request_payload.exposure_text: 🚨 Did you know? While politicians debate civil defense budgets, real communities are taking action. In my town, we organized a neighborhood preparedness group after last year's unexpected blackouts. No government program needed - just neighbors helping neighbors. Why wait for bureaucrats when we can protect ourselves? #CommunityResilience #CivilDefense
